subcodes.first_line: O enraptured leaf! The detailed letter thou didst write to his honour Áqá Siyyid Asadu'lláh hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه منجذبه مکتوب مفصلی که بجناب آقا سید اسدالله مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @music and singing
